name: elegy-mermaid
description: Governed skill definition for Elegy's Mermaid tooling surface: render governed workflow contracts to Mermaid, reverse Mermaid flowchart TD output into a bounded workflow-graph projection, and narrate either input as a derived report.

metadata.summary: Deterministic Mermaid projection tooling over governed canonical workflow inputs, with bounded reverse and narrative outputs that remain non-authoritative.

triggers.description: When work involves Mermaid projection tooling through the umbrella Elegy CLI.
When Mermaid flowchart TD output should be reversed into a bounded workflow-graph report.
When Mermaid or canonical workflow input should be narrated as a concise derived description.
When canonical workflow artifacts need Mermaid rendering or Mermaid-derived explanation.

constraints.description: Mermaid output, reverse projections, and narrative reports remain derived projections and must not be described as canonical workflow authority.
Reverse output is a bounded workflow-graph-semantics report rooted in Mermaid node ids and labels, not full canonical workflow reconstruction.
This slice stays on the umbrella `elegy` CLI and must not imply a dedicated binary, wrapper root, or release lane.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: One of render, reverse, or narrate.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Optional file path; when omitted the command reads from stdin.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Optional CLI output format; use json for structured machine-readable output.

output.description: Deterministic Mermaid render output, bounded workflow-graph reverse projections, and concise derived narrative reports.
